shared.btn-commits: We suggest you check our Page Commits for more details on updates

motw.title: MOTW
motw.motw-msg:
THE WORLD IS YOU CANVAS

SO TAKE UP YOUR BRUSH

AND PAINT

THE WORLD

RED
motw.nmsg-date: (new one on 2025/01/07 and happy new year)

blog.nocontent: Nothing more to check here! Come back tomorrow to check the new post!
blog.post-text-a:
This is a small post, but it's made to say something "important"

This year we will dedicate our time in making bouncering, and to update the page quickly with new features, today i added (limited) language support for this page, for now its only on the blog and index, but im working on the other things, so stay tuned on that.

aboutus.n4c-desc: "I am just a chill, lazy guy that has inspiration on his job, likes coding things, and is a proud member of The NATUNATIC Team, i am also the one behind this page and things like the code of the Introverse Mod and The Bounce Ring Project, thats about it."
aboutus.julibros-desc: "I am an ordinary person that loves to Draw, to Create and listen to Music. I am the creator of most NATUNATIC stories, Like: Introverse Mod, Animal Tower, Wild and Room, etc. For me it's very nice to see how a funny idea of a cat lost in a forest envolved into Natunatic. I hope continue making people happy with my ideas."

maintenance.text-2: This page cannot be accesed right now since it's under construction or in maintenance, come back later maybe?
maintenance.text-3: If you actually did that, and it is not available yet, then wait more! If you're impatient or waited too much (more than 3 days) contact n4c via Discord (n4c._)
maintenance.text-4: You can also check the GitHub Actions to see if something went wrong
